caption: A man is seated in a recording studio, wearing a white shirt with suspenders, a bow tie, glasses, and black headphones. He sports a tall, greyish-blonde hairstyle. He is positioned in front of a black professional microphone. Behind him, a wall features a poster of a face and a framed yellow shield logo, along with text that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS". Red and white logos are overlaid on the screen, including one that says "PODCAST" and another that reads "BE TALK 101". As the sequence progresses, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand, which moves from a raised position toward his body. His facial expression remains relatively consistent as he talks into the microphone, and the background and on-screen graphics remain static throughout the clip.
